report_metadata.title: URGENT: LATAM Airlines Passenger Removal Incident
report_metadata.location: Arturo Merino Benítez International Airport, Santiago, Chile

critical_issues: Due process violations in passenger removal

violations.description: Failure to provide evidence or proper justification for passenger removal
violations.evidence: Passenger repeatedly demanded proof of alleged aggression
evidence_quotes: Me muestran donde fui agresivo. ¿Tiene prueba?
ya donde está la prueba porque yo no fui agresivo
violations.legal_principle: Audi alteram partem - right to be heard and see evidence

violations.description: Lack of procedural fairness in handling passenger complaints
violations.evidence: Passenger not given opportunity to explain cultural context
evidence_quotes: Y yo toque sin querer, yo soy de Brasil, nosotros nos tocamos
violations.legal_principle: Right to explain actions before punitive measures
violations.recommendation: Cultural sensitivity protocols and mediation procedures

violations.description: Premature escalation to security/police without de-escalation attempts
violations.evidence: Staff immediately activated security within first minute
evidence_quotes: Ya activamos seguridad. Igual va a tener que bajar
violations.recommendation: De-escalation training and protocols for cabin crew

violations.description: Failure to properly document incident before punitive action
violations.evidence: Evidence gathering mentioned after removal decision
evidence_quotes: Podemos pedir las cameras del aeropuerto.
violations.recommendation: Incident reporting system with real-time documentation

violations.description: Lack of cultural competence in interpreting passenger behavior
violations.evidence: Cultural misunderstanding about physical contact norms
evidence_quotes: yo soy de Brasil, nosotros nos tocamos
violations.legal_principle: Duty to understand passenger cultural context
violations.recommendation: Cultural awareness training for international routes

regulatory_risks.description: Potential investigation by international aviation body

reputational_risks.description: Incident involves recording and potential publicity

immediate: Suspend removal decision pending proper investigation
Review all evidence (airport cameras, crew statements)
Document incident with proper chain of evidence
Offer passenger mediation with cultural interpreter
urgent: Implement de-escalation protocols for cabin crew
Conduct cultural sensitivity briefing for Santiago-based crew
short_term: Develop cultural competence training for international routes
Create Latin American cultural guide for crew
long_term: Audit all passenger removal incidents from past year
Establish independent review board for contentious removals
